button.name: action_open_convert_wizard
button.invisible: type == 'opportunity' or not active or not is_validated

div.style: white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

div.div: Capturing details — Complete the lead details below, then click "Send For Verification".

div.style: white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

div.div: Pending verification — Review the Enquiry Verification tab and click Approve Lead or Reject Lead.

div.style: white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

div.div: Lead rejected — Review the remarks, correct the details and resubmit.

div.style: white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

div.invisible: claimed_by == False or is_in_capturing_details == True or is_claimed_by_me == True

div.style: white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

div.div:
Claimed by
— only the claimer or a Vertical Head can act.

div.style: white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
div.invisible: claimed_by == False or is_in_capturing_details == True or is_claimed_by_me == False

div.style: white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

button.name: action_approve_lead
button.invisible: is_validated or type == 'opportunity' or claimed_by == False

button.name: action_reject_lead
button.invisible: is_validated or type == 'opportunity' or claimed_by == False

button.name: action_move_to_design_review
button.invisible: type == 'lead' or is_at_qrf_stage == False or needs_design_review == False

button.name: action_move_to_technical_meeting
button.invisible: type == 'lead' or is_at_qrf_stage == False or needs_design_review == True or has_any_approved_qrf == False

button.name: action_skip_to_quotation
button.invisible: type == 'lead' or is_at_design_review_stage == False or design_review_status != 'approved'

button.name: action_mark_design_reviewed
button.invisible: type == 'lead' or is_at_design_review_stage == False or design_review_status == 'approved'

button.name: %(dec_crm.action_dec_crm_lead_lost)d
button.invisible: type != 'lead' or won_status != 'pending' or not active or claimed_by == False

button.name: %(dec_crm.action_dec_crm_lead_lost)d
button.invisible: type != 'opportunity' or won_status != 'pending' or not active or claimed_by == False

button.name: %(dec_crm.action_quotation_revision_request_wizard)d
button.invisible: type != 'opportunity' or has_approved_quotation == False or has_pending_revision_request == True

button.name: %(dec_crm.action_crm_lead_send_quotation_wizard)d
button.invisible: type != 'opportunity' or has_approved_quotation == False or is_sent_to_client == True

button.name: action_move_to_negotiations
button.invisible: type != 'opportunity' or has_approved_quotation == False or not is_at_quotation_stage

page.name: contact_persons_tab
page.div: Select or create contact persons linked to the selected Company.

page.name: branches_tab
page.div: Add branch / location details for the selected Company.

page.name: enquiry_documents_tab
page.div: Enquiry Documents — Documents uploaded when moving this lead to QRF stage appear here. These documents are read-only; to upload new documents, use the "Cross-Sell Lead" button.

page.name: design_review_tab
page.div: Pending Design Review — Add quantities and click "Mark as Reviewed".
page.p: Upload design drawings, PDFs, and other review documents.

page.name: technical_meeting_tab
page.div: Technical Meeting Pending — Schedule and complete the meeting.

button.name: action_complete_technical_meeting
button.invisible: technical_meeting_state == 'completed' or is_at_technical_meeting_stage == False or needs_design_review == True

div.p: Use the "📎 Attach Quotation" button in the header to add quotation documents.
Click the "Quotations" smart button above to view all attached quotations.

field.name: help
field.p: No leads in queue. All leads have been claimed.
